title: RCAN INVOKE Message
description: §19 Behavior/Skill Invocation Protocol — INVOKE message. Sent by a client to request execution of a named skill on a robot.

skill.description: Name of the skill to invoke. MUST match an entry in the robot's invoke.params.skills capability list.

params.description: Skill-specific input parameters. Schema is defined per skill. Omit if the skill takes no parameters.

timeout_ms.description: Maximum milliseconds to wait for INVOKE_RESULT. Defaults to 30000 ms. If exceeded, the robot MUST send INVOKE_RESULT with status 'timeout'.

msg_id.description: Unique message ID (UUIDv4 or caller-scoped token). Used by INVOKE_RESULT to correlate the response via reply_to.
